evaluator: base
type: check
id: Inclusivity
name: Inclusivity
severity: warning
evaluateAs: document
---

# Inclusivity

Flag any instance of gendered pronouns used to refer to a person (e.g., "he", "she", "him", "her") where "they" or "their" could be used instead. Also flag gendered role nouns where a neutral alternative exists (e.g., "policeman" instead of "police officer", "fireman" instead of "firefighter", "mankind" instead of "humanity"). 

Also flag violent or exclusionary metaphors with no literal meaning in context (e.g., "crush the competition", "rockstar developer", "ninja engineer"). 

Do not flag gendered terms when they refer to a specific, known individual, and do not flag technical terms or proper nouns that happen to contain gendered roots (e.g., "managed").
